name: Todo List Agent
description: A to-do list manager with a web UI and a conversational agent interface.

methods.name: Create Todo
methods.description: Create a new to-do item with a title and optional AI notes.

methods.name: List Todos
methods.description: List all to-do items, optionally filtered by completion status.

methods.name: Update Todo
methods.description: Update fields on an existing to-do item.

methods.name: Toggle Todo
methods.description: Toggle the completed status of a to-do item.

methods.name: Delete Todo
methods.description: Delete a to-do item by ID.

scenarios.name: Sample Todos
scenarios.description: A mix of completed and pending tasks with AI notes
